channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-690] conf-sanity test_21a: @@@@@@ FAIL: can't put import for lustre-OST0000-osc(ost) into FULL state
item.description:
– increase maxtime to wait the timeout of 1st request; take into account at_min value;
– cleanup wait_osc_import_state () to use _wait_import_state ();
– ost-pools test_1 fix: use local var instead of global NAME
item.summary: conf-sanity test_21a: @@@@@@ FAIL: can't put import for lustre-OST0000-osc(ost) into FULL state

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:

Result = SUCCESS

Patches have been pushed to both b1_8 and master branches. The issue is resolved.
